mapper.sql: amazonAuthId, marketplace_name, posted_date, transaction_type, amount_type, amount_description, currency, amount, quantity_purchased
mapper.select:
select s.amazonAuthId,s.marketplace_name,
DATE_FORMAT(s.posted_date,'%y-%m') posted_date
DATE_FORMAT(acc.deposit_date,'%y-%m') posted_date
, s.currency , sum(case when a.region='EU' then case when transaction_type='Order' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and (amount_description='Principal' or amount_description='Tax') then amount else 0 end else case when transaction_type='Order' and amount_description='Principal' then amount else 0 end end) in_principal , sum(case when (transaction_type='Order' and amount_description!='Principal' and amount_description not like 'FBA%' and amount_description not like 'Commission%' ) or amount_type='FBA Inventory Reimbursement' then amount else 0 end) in_other ,
sum(case when amount_type='Cost of Advertising' then amount else 0 end) out_adv ,
sum(case when (transaction_type='Order' or transaction_type='Refund') and amount_description like 'Commission%' then amount else 0 end) out_commission,
sum(case when transaction_type='Order' and amount_description like 'FBA%' then amount else 0 end) out_fba, sum(case when transaction_type='Refund' then amount else 0 end) out_refund,
sum(case when (transaction_type!='Order' and transaction_type!='Refund' and amount_type!='Cost of Advertising' and amount_type!='FBA Inventory Reimbursement' ) or ( transaction_type='Order' and amount_description='Principal' and amount_type!='ItemPrice' )
then amount else 0 end ) out_other ,sum(ifnull(s.amount,0)) converted_total from t_amz_settlement_summary_month s left join t_amazon_auth a on a.id=s.amazonAuthId
left join t_amz_settlement_acc_report acc on acc.settlement_id=s.settlementid
where 1=1
and s.posted_date>=#{fromDate,jdbcType=CHAR} and s.posted_date<=#{endDate,jdbcType=CHAR}
and acc.deposit_date>=#{fromDate,jdbcType=CHAR} and acc.deposit_date<=#{endDate,jdbcType=CHAR}
and s.marketplace_name=#{marketplace_name,jdbcType=CHAR}
and a.groupid=#{groupid,jdbcType=CHAR}
and s.settlementid=#{settlementid,jdbcType=CHAR}
and a.shop_id=#{shopid,jdbcType=CHAR} group by s.amazonAuthId,s.marketplace_name,
DATE_FORMAT(s.posted_date,'%y-%m')
DATE_FORMAT(acc.deposit_date,'%y-%m')
,s.currency
mapper.delete:
delete from t_amz_settlement_summary_month where settlementid=#{settlement_id,jdbcType=CHAR};
insert into t_amz_settlement_summary_month select UUID_SHORT(), r.settlement_id, r.amazonAuthId, ifnull(rt.marketplace_name,r.marketplace_name), r.posted_date, transaction_type, amount_type, amount_description , fulfillment_id fulfillment_type, r.currency,sum(amount), sum(case when r.transaction_type='Refund' AND r.amount_type='ItemPrice' AND r.amount_description='Principal' then IFNULL((SELECT sum(quantity) from t_amz_returns_report rr where rr.order_id=r.order_id AND rr.sku=r.sku AND rr.sellerid=a.sellerid),1) ELSE r.quantity_purchased END) quantity_purchased, COUNT(DISTINCT r.order_id) from t_amz_settlement_report r left JOIN t_amz_settlement_acc_report rt ON rt.settlement_id=r.settlement_id LEFT JOIN t_amazon_auth a ON a.id=r.amazonAuthId where r.settlement_id=#{settlement_id,jdbcType=CHAR} group BY r.amazonAuthId,ifnull(rt.marketplace_name,r.marketplace_name),r.posted_date ,transaction_type ,amount_type ,amount_description,fulfillment_id,r.currency
mapper.insert:
insert into t_amz_settlement_summary_month (amazonAuthId, marketplace_name, posted_date, transaction_type, amount_type, amount_description, fulfillment_type,currency, amount ) values
( #{smonth.amazonauthid,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{smonth.marketplaceName,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{smonth.postedDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{smonth.transactionType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{smonth.amountType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{smonth.amountDescription,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{smonth.fulfillmentType,jdbcType=CHAR},#{smonth.currency,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{smonth.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL} )
mapper.select:
SELECT m.posted_date,currency,
SUM(case when transaction_type='Order' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and amount_description='Principal' and fulfillment_type='MFN' then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Seller fulfilled product sales`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Refund' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and amount_description in ('Principal','Goodwill','RestockingFee') and fulfillment_type='MFN') then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Seller_fulfilled product sale refunds`,
SUM(case when transaction_type='Order' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and amount_description='Principal' and fulfillment_type='AFN' then amount ELSE 0 END ) `FBA product sales`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Refund' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and amount_description in ('Principal','Goodwill','RestockingFee') and fulfillment_type='AFN') then amount ELSE 0 END ) `FBA product sale refunds`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='other-transaction' and amount_type='FBA Inventory Reimbursement' and amount_description IN ('REVERSAL_REIMBURSEMENT','WAREHOUSE_LOST','WAREHOUSE_DAMAGE','FREE_REPLACEMENT_REFUND_ITEMS') ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `FBA inventory credit`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Liquidations' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and amount_description = 'Principal' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `FBA liquidation proceeds`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Liquidations Adjustments' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and amount_description = 'Principal' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `FBA Liquidations proceeds adjustments`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Order' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and amount_description = 'Shipping' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Postage credits`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Refund' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and amount_description = 'Shipping' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Delivery credit refunds`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Order' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and amount_description = 'GiftWrap' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Gift wrap credits`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Refund' and amount_type='ItemPrice' and amount_description = 'GiftWrap' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Gift wrap credits refunds`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Order' and amount_type='Promotion' and amount_description = 'Shipping' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Promotional rebates`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Refund' and amount_type='Promotion' and amount_description = 'Shipping' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Promotional rebate refunds`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Order' and amount_type in ('ItemFees','ItemFee') and amount_description = 'Commission' and fulfillment_type='MFN') then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Seller_fulfilled selling fees`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Order' and amount_type in ('ItemFees','ItemFee') and amount_description = 'Commission' and fulfillment_type='AFN') then amount ELSE 0 END ) `FBA selling fees`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Refund' and amount_type='ItemFees' and amount_description = 'Commission' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Selling fee refunds`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='ServiceFee' and amount_type='Refund for Advertiser' and amount_description = 'TransactionTotalAmount' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Refund for Advertiser`,
SUM(case when transaction_type in ('Order','FBAFees') and amount_type in ('ItemFees','ItemFee','FBA Customer Returns Fee (Non-Apparel an') and amount_description IN( 'FBAPerUnitFulfillmentFee', 'ShippingChargeback', 'GiftwrapChargeback', 'Base fee' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `FBA transaction fees`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Refund' and amount_type='ItemFees' and amount_description = 'ShippingChargeback' ) OR (transaction_type='Fee Adjustment' and amount_type='Item Fee Adjustment' and amount_description = 'FBA Pick & Pack Fee') then amount ELSE 0 END ) `FBA transaction fee refunds`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Order' and amount_type='ItemFees' and amount_description IN( 'Digital Services Fee','DigitalServicesFee' )) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Other transaction fees`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Refund' and amount_type='ItemFees' and amount_description IN( 'Digital Services Fee','DigitalServicesFee' )) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Other transaction fee refunds`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='other-transaction' and amount_type IN ('other-transaction','ItemFees' ) and amount_description IN( 'Storage Fee','StorageRenewalBilling','Inbound Transportation Fee',
'DisposalComplete','FBACustomerReturnPerUnitFee' )) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `FBA inventory and inbound services fees`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type in ('other-transaction','AmazonFees') and amount_type in ('other-transaction','Deal Participation Fee','Deal Performance Based Fee') and amount_description IN( 'Subscription Fee','Base fee' )) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Service fees`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='Refund' and amount_type='ItemFees' and amount_description = 'RefundCommission' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Refund administration fees`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='other-transaction' and amount_type in ('FBA Inventory Reimbursement','other-transaction') and amount_description IN( 'COMPENSATED_CLAWBACK','REMOVAL_ORDER_LOST','Overpaid Fees Adjustment','BuyerRecharge') ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Adjustments`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type='ServiceFee' and amount_type='Cost of Advertising' and amount_description = 'TransactionTotalAmount' ) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Cost of Advertising`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type IN ('Liquidations' ,'Liquidations Adjustments') and amount_type IN ('ItemFees') and amount_description IN( 'LiquidationsBrokerageFee','LiquidationsBrokerageFee' )) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Liquidations fees`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type IN ('Order' ,'Liquidations','Order_Retrocharge','Liquidations Adjustments') and amount_type IN ('ItemPrice','Promotion') and amount_description IN( 'Tax','ShippingTax','GiftWrapTax','TaxDiscount' )) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Product, delivery and gift wrap taxes collected`,
SUM(case when (transaction_type IN ('Refund','Refund_Retrocharge') and amount_type IN ('ItemPrice','Promotion') and amount_description IN( 'Tax','ShippingTax','GiftWrapTax','TaxDiscount' )) then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Product, delivery and gift wrap taxes refunded`,
SUM(case when amount_type ='ItemWithheldTax' then amount ELSE 0 END ) `Amazon obligated tax withheld`,
sum(m.amount) `Total Income Expenses Tax` from t_amz_settlement_summary_month m WHERE m.amazonauthid=#{amazonauthid,jdbcType=CHAR} AND m.marketplace_name=#{marketplace_name,jdbcType=CHAR} AND m.posted_date>=#{fromDate,jdbcType=CHAR} AND m.posted_date<#{endDate,jdbcType=CHAR} group by m.posted_date,m.currency
